footer.needAccount: Need an account? Please contact your administrator

messages.validEmailRequired: Please provide a valid email address
messages.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long

verifyOtp.title: Verify Your Identity
verifyOtp.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit OTP code to your email:
verifyOtp.developmentHelp: You can enter any 6-digit code or leave it empty to bypass OTP verification.
verifyOtp.developmentInputHelp: Development mode: Any 6-digit code works, or leave empty to bypass
verifyOtp.inputHelp: Please check your email inbox and spam folder
verifyOtp.securityNoticeBody: This OTP is valid for 5 minutes and can only be used once. If you didn't request this login, please contact your administrator immediately.
verifyOtp.expiredHelp: Please return to the login page to request a new OTP code.
